summary: Comprehensive testing of GPI Document Hub after router refactoring (85 routes extracted from server.py to 9 domain-specific routers) and Reference Intelligence scoring redesign. All 43 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully functional: Dashboard, Document Queue, Stable Vendors pages all load correctly with data.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to tenant config - PRE-EXISTING issue, not a regression

critical_code_review_comments: Router refactoring successful: All 85 routes from server.py now in modular router files
Reference Intelligence scoring redesign validated: domain-aware multi-signal scoring works correctly
All 9 domain routers functioning: Auth, Aliases, Mailbox Sources, File Import, BC Integration, Spiro, Documents, Workflows, Reference Intelligence
Dynamic routes (upload, classify, resolve, workflow mutations) registered via app.add_api_route() during startup - working
Legacy api_router still included for backward compatibility
Frontend successfully authenticates and displays: Dashboard KPIs, Document Queue (60 docs), Stable Vendors (17 vendors)

success_rate.backend: 100% (43/43 tests - 27 router tests + 16 reference intelligence tests)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 60 documents and 17 vendors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Router refactoring complete and tested. 9 domain routers extracted from monolith server.py. Reference Intelligence scoring redesigned with domain-aware multi-signal scoring (16 unit tests all pass). Frontend working: Dashboard shows KPIs (60 docs, 73.3% validation rate, 48.3% vendor match rate), Document Queue shows pending/completed/cleared docs, Stable Vendors shows 17 vendors with override controls.

verified_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Admin/admin credentials work, returns JWT token
verified_endpoints.GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/reference-in: PASS - Returns stored ref intel data

verified_ui_pages.Login Page: PASS - Form renders, admin/admin login works
verified_ui_pages.Dashboard: PASS - KPIs displayed (60 docs, 73.3% validation, 48.3% vendor match, 0 exceptions)
verified_ui_pages.Document Queue: PASS - Shows 60 total docs, 37 pending, 18 auto-cleared with document table
verified_ui_pages.Stable Vendors: PASS - Shows 17 vendors with status/score/metrics table
verified_ui_pages.Navigation Sidebar: PASS - All 11 nav links present and working

reference_intelligence_tests.domain_classification: PASS - Purchase orders classified as purchase domain
reference_intelligence_tests.source_doc_awareness: PASS - AP Invoice routes to purchase pool
reference_intelligence_tests.context_gate: PASS - Sales excluded from AP Invoice primary pool
reference_intelligence_tests.semantic_typing: PASS - PO number boosts purchase, penalizes sales
reference_intelligence_tests.two_signal_minimum: PASS - Single signal never gets 'Likely Match'
reference_intelligence_tests.counterparty_scoring: PASS - Vendor match boosts, mismatch penalizes

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
